name: clh_enrollment
description: Records linking learners to the workshops they have enrolled in.

attributes.name: clh_workshop
attributes.description: The workshop this enrollment is for.

attributes.name: clh_learner
attributes.description: The learner record, if the participant is a registered learner.

attributes.name: clh_anonymousname
attributes.description: Full name provided by an anonymous (unauthenticated) participant at enrolment.

attributes.name: clh_anonymousemail
attributes.description: Email provided by an anonymous participant. Used to send confirmation and reminders.

attributes.name: clh_anonymousphone
attributes.description: Phone number provided by an anonymous participant.

attributes.name: clh_enrollmentdate
attributes.description: Date and time the enrollment was submitted.

attributes.name: clh_accessibilityrequirements
attributes.description: Accessibility needs submitted with this enrollment.

attributes.name: clh_notes
attributes.description: Any additional information or special requests from the participant.

attributes.name: clh_confirmationsentat
attributes.description: Timestamp when the confirmation email was sent. Populated by Power Automate.

attributes.name: clh_confirmationcode
attributes.description: Unique confirmation code for the enrollment.

attributes.name: clh_remindersent
attributes.description: Indicates whether a reminder has been sent for this enrollment.
